title: aerangis pulchella
intro: Aerangis pulchella, also known as the Yellow Bifrenaria or the Yellow Aerangis, is an epiphytic orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various respiratory issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Aerangis pulchella include its potential in reducing inflammation, fighting off fungal infections, and aiding in the treatment of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues when administered under the guidance of a medical professional.
